description_long: This is a rectangular, modern storage cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, light beige finish. The front face displays two large drawers, one of which is partially open, revealing a white interior and a smaller brown compartment. There is also an open cubby space on the lower left side, suitable for storing small items or electronics. The sides and top are plain, with no visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic. The back and side views show a solid, unadorned surface, while the front view highlights the cabinet's storage functionality. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, rectangular beige storage cabinet with two drawers and an open cubby, featuring a clean, handle-less design. The front reveals a partially open drawer and a small brown compartment inside.
description_view_0: A plain, solid beige side panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view shows two drawers, one open to reveal a white interior and a brown compartment, plus an open cubby on the lower left.
description_view_2: Another plain, solid beige side panel, identical to the opposite side.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the internal structure of the drawers, including a white sliding mechanism and a brown compartment.
